Off Calendar Oct-01-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS PINN BROTHERS CONSTRUCTION, INC. AND ALAN R. PINN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANT. DEFENDANT FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT THE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS VOID. COURT CONSTRUES THE MOTION AS AN ATTORNEY AFFIDAVIT OF FAULT MOTION. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO PAY $1,000 TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL AS REASONABLE FEES/SANCTIONS. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
